text: ヒルダ
アフィン
Hilda
Afin

討伐目標の「ロックベア」だ。
これまでの技術を駆使し、討伐しろ。

敵の動きを読み、弱点を叩け。
大きな攻撃の後には、隙が生じる。
そこを狙うのが基本だ。

/ci1 2 あ、あんなでかい奴と
いきなり戦うのかよ！

/ci1 2 相棒！　俺は援護に回る！
前衛は頼んだぜ！

Your objective is to suppress the Rockbear.
Utilize the skills you've honed to suppress it.

Read the enemy's movements, and strike its
weak point. You'll see an opening after it
performs a large attack. Aim for it.

/ci1 2 W-We're going to fight that
huge thing all of a sudden!?

/ci1 2 Mate! I'll provide backup!
You take the lead!
